stemHtml: Air Traffic Control may require an aircraft to make routine meteorological reports of air temperature, wind direction and speed, and any icing or turbulence experienced.Aircraft without data link communication equipment are…

options.a: obliged to report every 30 minutes, regardless of the aircraft’s position.
options.b: required to report at a normal ATS reporting point, approximately every 30 minutes.
options.c: exempt from the need to make such reports unless specifically required by ATC.
options.d: expected to report only once, immediately after the request.
